name: Artisan
text: +1 Card. Gain a card to your hand costing up to $5. Put a card from your hand onto your deck.

name: Bandit
text: Gain a Gold. Each other player reveals the top 2 cards of their deck, trashes one of them that is a Treasure other than Copper, and discards the rest.

name: Bureaucrat
text: Gain a Silver onto your deck. Each other player reveals a Victory card from their hand and puts it onto their deck (or reveals a hand with no Victory cards).

name: Cellar
text: +1 Action. Discard any number of cards, then draw that many.

name: Chapel
text: Trash up to 4 cards from your hand.

name: Council Room
text: +4 Cards. +1 Buy. Each other player draws a card.

name: Festival
text: +2 Actions. +1 Buy. +$2.

name: Gardens
text: Worth 1VP per 10 cards you have (rounded down).

name: Harbinger
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. Look through your discard pile. You may put a card from it onto your deck.

name: Laboratory
text: +2 Cards. +1 Action.

name: Library
text: Draw until you have 7 cards in hand, skipping any Action cards you choose to; set those aside, discarding them afterwards.

name: Market
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. +1 Buy. +$1.

name: Merchant
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. The first time you play a Silver this turn, +$1.

name: Militia
text: +$2. Each other player discards down to 3 cards in hand.

name: Mine
text: You may trash a Treasure from your hand. Gain a Treasure to your hand costing up to $3 more than it.

name: Moat
text: +2 Cards. When another player plays an Attack card, you may first reveal this from your hand, to be unaffected by it.

name: Moneylender
text: You may trash a Copper from your hand for +$3.

name: Poacher
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. +$1. Discard a card per empty Supply pile.

name: Remodel
text: Trash a card from your hand. Gain a card costing up to $2 more than it.

name: Sentry
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. Look at the top 2 cards of your deck. Trash and/or discard any number of them. Put the rest back in any order.

name: Smithy
text: +3 Cards.

name: Throne Room
text: You may play an Action card from your hand twice.

name: Vassal
text: +$2. Discard the top card of your deck. If it's an Action card, you may play it.

name: Village
text: +1 Card. +2 Actions.

name: Witch
text: +2 Cards. Each other player gains a Curse.

name: Workshop
text: Gain a card costing up to $4.

name: Baron
text: +1 Buy. You may discard an Estate for +$4. If you don't, gain an Estate.

name: Bridge
text: This turn, cards cost $1 less (but not less than $0). +1 Buy. +$1.

name: Conspirator
text: +$2. If you've played 3 or more Actions this turn (counting this): +1 Card, +1 Action.

name: Courtier
text: Reveal a card from your hand. For each type it has, choose one (must be different): +1 Action; +1 Buy; +$3; gain a Gold.

name: Courtyard
text: +3 Cards. Put a card from your hand onto your deck.

name: Diplomat
text: +2 Cards. If you have 5 or fewer cards in hand (after drawing): +2 Actions. When another player plays an Attack, you may reveal this (if you have ≥5 cards in hand) to draw 2 cards then discard 3.

name: Duke
text: Worth 1VP per Duchy you have.

name: Ironworks
text: Gain a card costing up to $4. If the gained card is an Action: +1 Action. Treasure: +$1. Victory: +1 Card.

name: Lurker
text: +1 Action. Choose one: Trash an Action card from the Supply; or gain an Action card from the Trash.

name: Masquerade
text: +2 Cards. Each player with any cards in hand passes one to the next player to their left, at once. Then you may trash a card from your hand.

name: Mill
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. You may discard 2 cards for +$2. (1VP)

name: Mining Village
text: +1 Card. +2 Actions. You may trash this card immediately for +$2.

name: Minion
text: +1 Action. Choose one: +$2; or discard your hand, +4 Cards, and each other player with 5+ cards in hand discards their hand and draws 4 cards.

name: Nobles
text: Choose one: +3 Cards; or +2 Actions. (2VP)

name: Patrol
text: +3 Cards. Reveal the top 4 cards of your deck. Put the Victory cards and Curses into your hand. Put the rest back in any order.

name: Pawn
text: Choose two different options: +1 Card; +1 Action; +1 Buy; +$1.

name: Replace
text: Trash a card from your hand. Gain a card costing up to $2 more. If the gained card is an Action or Treasure, put it on your deck. If it's a Victory card, each other player gains a Curse.

name: Secret Passage
text: +2 Cards. +1 Action. Take a card from your hand and put it anywhere in your deck.

name: Shanty Town
text: +2 Actions. Reveal your hand. If you have no Action cards in hand, +2 Cards.

name: Steward
text: Choose one: +2 Cards; or +$2; or trash 2 cards from your hand.

name: Swindler
text: +$2. Each other player trashes the top card of their deck and gains a card of the same cost that you choose.

name: Torturer
text: +3 Cards. Each other player either discards 2 cards or gains a Curse to their hand, their choice.

name: Trading Post
text: Trash 2 cards from your hand. If you did, gain a Silver to your hand.

name: Upgrade
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. Trash a card from your hand. Gain a card costing exactly $1 more than it.

name: Wishing Well
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. Name a card, then reveal the top card of your deck. If it's the named card, put it into your hand.

name: Bazaar
text: +1 Card. +2 Actions. +$1.

name: Caravan
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. At the start of your next turn, +1 Card.

name: Cutpurse
text: +$2. Each other player discards a Copper from their hand (or reveals a hand with no Copper).

name: Fishing Village
text: +2 Actions. +$1. At the start of your next turn: +1 Action, +$1.

name: Ghost Ship
text: +2 Cards. Each other player with 4 or more cards in hand puts cards from their hand onto their deck until they have 3 cards in hand.

name: Haven
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. Set aside a card from your hand face down. At the start of your next turn, put it into your hand.

name: Island
text: Set aside this and a card from your hand. Return them to your deck at end of game. (2VP)

name: Lighthouse
text: +1 Action. +$1. At the start of your next turn, +$1. While this is in play, when another player plays an Attack, it doesn't affect you.

name: Merchant Ship
text: +$2. At the start of your next turn, +$2.

name: Salvager
text: +1 Buy. Trash a card from your hand. +$ equal to its cost.

name: Sea Hag
text: Each other player discards the top card of their deck, then gains a Curse, putting it on top of their deck.

name: Smugglers
text: Gain a copy of a card costing up to $6 that the player to your right gained on their last turn.

name: Tactician
text: Discard your hand. If you discarded any cards, then at the start of your next turn: +5 Cards, +1 Action, +1 Buy.

name: Warehouse
text: +3 Cards. +1 Action. Discard 3 cards.

name: Wharf
text: +2 Cards. +1 Buy. At the start of your next turn: +2 Cards, +1 Buy.

name: Astrolabe
text: +$1. +1 Buy. At the start of your next turn: +$1, +1 Buy.

name: Blockade
text: Gain a card costing up to $4, setting it aside. At the start of your next turn, put it into your hand. While it's set aside, when another player gains a copy of it, they gain a Curse.

name: Corsair
text: +$2. At the start of your next turn, +1 Card. While this is in play, each other player trashes the first Silver or Gold they play each turn.

name: Monkey
text: Until your next turn, when the player to your left gains a card, +1 Card. At the start of your next turn, +1 Card.

name: Pirate
text: At the start of your next turn, gain a Treasure costing up to $6 to your hand. When any player gains a Treasure, you may play this from your hand.

name: Sailor
text: At the start of your next turn: +$2, and you may trash a card from your hand. When you gain this, you may play a Duration card from your hand.

name: Sea Chart
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. Reveal the top card of your deck. If you have a copy of it in play, put it into your hand.

name: Sea Witch
text: +2 Cards. At the start of your next turn, each other player gains a Curse, then discard 2 cards.

name: Tide Pools
text: +3 Cards. +1 Action. At the start of your next turn, discard 2 cards.

name: Treasure Map
text: Trash this and a copy of Treasure Map from your hand. If you trashed two Treasure Maps, gain 4 Golds to your deck.

name: Anvil
text: +$1. You may discard a Treasure. If you do, gain a card costing up to $4.

name: Watchtower
text: Draw until you have 6 cards in hand. When you gain a card, you may reveal this from your hand; if you do, either trash that card or put it onto your deck.

name: Bishop
text: +$1. +1VP. Trash a card from your hand. +VP equal to half its cost in coins, rounded down. Each other player may trash a card from their hand.

name: Clerk
text: +$2. Each other player with 5 or more cards in hand puts one onto their deck. When any player buys a card, you may play this from your hand.

name: Investment
text: Trash a card from your hand. Choose one: +$1 per differently named Treasure you have in play; or trash this for +1VP per differently named Treasure you have in play.

name: Quarry
text: +$1. While this is in play, Action cards cost $2 less, but not less than $0.

name: Talisman
text: +$1. While this is in play, when you buy a non-Victory card costing $4 or less, gain a copy of it.

name: Tiara
text: +1 Buy. This turn, when you buy a card, you may put it onto your deck.

name: Worker's Village
text: +1 Card. +2 Actions. +1 Buy.

name: City
text: +1 Card. +2 Actions. If there are one or more empty Supply piles: +$1. If there are two or more: +1 Card, +1 Buy.

name: Collection
text: +$2. This turn, when you gain an Action card, +1VP.

name: Crystal Ball
text: +$1. Look at the top card of your deck. You may trash it, discard it, or put it back.

name: Magnate
text: Reveal your hand. +1 Card per Treasure in your hand.

name: Mint
text: You may reveal a Treasure from your hand. Gain a copy of it. When you buy this, trash all Treasures you have in play.

name: Mountebank
text: +$2. Each other player may discard a Curse. If they don't, they gain a Curse and a Copper.

name: Rabble
text: +3 Cards. Each other player reveals the top 3 cards of their deck, discards the Actions and Treasures, and puts the rest back in any order.

name: Vault
text: +2 Cards. Discard any number of cards. +$1 per card discarded. Each other player may discard 2 cards; if they do, they draw a card.

name: Venture
text: +$1. When you play this, reveal cards from your deck until you reveal a Treasure. Discard the other cards. Play that Treasure.

name: War Chest
text: The player to your left names a card. Gain a card costing up to $5 that hasn't been named for this.

name: Charlatan
text: +$3. Each other player gains a Curse. In games using this, Curses are also Treasure cards worth $1.

name: Goons
text: +1 Buy. +$2. Each other player discards down to 3 cards in hand. While this is in play, when you buy a card, +1VP.

name: Grand Market
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. +1 Buy. +$2. You can't buy this if you have any Copper in play.

name: Hoard
text: +$2. While this is in play, when you buy a Victory card, gain a Gold.

name: Bank
text: +$X, where X is the number of Treasures you have in play, counting this.

name: Expand
text: Trash a card from your hand. Gain a card costing up to $3 more than it.

name: Forge
text: Trash any number of cards from your hand. Gain a card with cost exactly equal to the total cost in coins of the trashed cards.

name: King's Court
text: You may play an Action card from your hand three times.

name: Peddler
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. +$1. During your Buy phase, this costs $2 less per Action card you have in play, but not less than $0.

name: Crossroads
text: Reveal your hand. +1 Card per Victory card revealed. If this is the first time you played Crossroads this turn, +3 Actions.

name: Fool's Gold
text: Worth $1, or $4 if it's the first Fool's Gold you've played this turn. When another player gains a Province, you may trash this from your hand to gain a Gold onto your deck.

name: Guard Dog
text: +2 Cards. When another player plays an Attack, you may first play this from your hand.

name: Oasis
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. +$1. Discard a card.

name: Scheme
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. At the start of Clean-up this turn, you may choose an Action card you have in play to put onto your deck.

name: Tunnel
text: 2VP. When you discard this other than during Clean-up, you may reveal it. If you do, gain a Gold.

name: Jack of All Trades
text: Gain a Silver. Look at the top card of your deck; discard it or put it back. Draw until you have 5 cards in hand. You may trash a non-Treasure card from your hand.

name: Noble Brigand
text: +$1. When you buy or play this, each other player reveals the top 2 cards of their deck, trashes a revealed Silver or Gold you choose, and discards the rest. You gain the trashed cards.

name: Silk Road
text: Worth 1VP per 4 Victory cards you have, rounded down.

name: Souk
text: +1 Buy. Gain a card costing up to $5. Discard any number of cards; -$1 per card discarded.

name: Spice Merchant
text: You may trash a Treasure from your hand. If you do, choose one: +2 Cards, +1 Action; or +$2, +1 Buy.

name: Trader
text: Trash a card from your hand. Gain a Silver per $1 it costs. When you would gain a card, you may reveal this from your hand to gain a Silver instead.

name: Berserker
text: Each other player gains a Copper to their hand. Gain a cheaper card. At the start of your next turn, +2 Cards.

name: Cauldron
text: +$2. +1 Buy. The third time you gain an Action card this turn, each other player gains a Curse.

name: Cartographer
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. Look at the top 4 cards of your deck. Discard any number of them. Put the rest back in any order.

name: Haggler
text: +$2. While this is in play, when you buy a card, gain a cheaper non-Victory card.

name: Highway
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. While this is in play, cards cost $1 less, but not less than $0.

name: Inn
text: +2 Cards. +2 Actions. Discard 2 cards. When you gain this, look through your discard pile (including this), reveal any number of Action cards from it, and shuffle them into your deck.

name: Margrave
text: +3 Cards. +1 Buy. Each other player draws a card, then discards down to 3 cards in hand.

name: Stables
text: You may discard a Treasure. If you do, +3 Cards, +1 Action.

name: Border Village
text: +1 Card. +2 Actions. When you gain this, gain a cheaper card.

name: Farmland
text: 2VP. When you buy this, trash a card from your hand. Gain a card costing exactly $2 more than it.

name: Embassy
text: +5 Cards. Discard 3 cards. When you gain this, each other player gains a Silver.

name: Treasure Hunter
text: +1 Action. +$1. Gain a Silver per card the player to your right gained on their last turn. You may exchange this for a Warrior.

name: Warrior
text: +2 Cards. Each other player discards down to 3 cards in hand. You may exchange this for a Hero.

name: Hero
text: +$2. Gain a Treasure. You may exchange this for a Champion.

name: Champion
text: +1 Action. For the rest of the game, when another player plays an Attack, it doesn't affect you, and when you play an Action, +1 Action.

name: Soldier
text: +$2, and +$1 per other Attack you have in play. Each other player with 4 or more cards in hand discards a card. You may exchange this for a Fugitive.

name: Fugitive
text: +2 Cards. +1 Action. Discard a card. You may exchange this for a Disciple.

name: Disciple
text: You may play an Action card from your hand twice. Gain a copy of it. You may exchange this for a Teacher.

name: Teacher
text: Put this on your Tavern mat. At the start of your turn, you may call this: move your +1 Card, +1 Action, +1 Buy, or +$1 token to an Action Supply pile you have no tokens on.

name: Page
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. You may exchange this for a Treasure Hunter.

name: Peasant
text: +1 Buy. +$1. You may exchange this for a Soldier.

name: Ratcatcher
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. Put this on your Tavern mat. At the start of your turn: You may call this to trash a card from your hand.

name: Raze
text: +1 Action. Trash this or a card from your hand. If you trashed a card, look at a number of cards from the top of your deck equal to its cost in coins. Put one into your hand and discard the rest.

name: Amulet
text: Now and at the start of your next turn, choose one: +$1; or trash a card from your hand; or gain a Silver.

name: Caravan Guard
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. At the start of your next turn: +$1. When another player plays an Attack, you may play this from your hand first.

name: Dungeon
text: +1 Action. Now and at the start of your next turn: +2 Cards, then discard 2 cards.

name: Gear
text: +2 Cards. Set aside up to 2 cards from your hand face down (under this). At the start of your next turn, put them into your hand.

name: Guide
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. Put this on your Tavern mat. At the start of your turn: You may call this to discard your hand and draw 5 cards.

name: Duplicate
text: Put this on your Tavern mat. At any time: Call this when you gain a card costing up to $6; gain a copy of that card.

name: Magpie
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. Reveal the top card of your deck. If it's a Treasure, put it into your hand. If it's an Action or Victory card, gain a Magpie.

name: Messenger
text: +1 Buy. +$2. You may put your deck into your discard pile. When you buy this, you may gain a card costing up to $4; each other player gains a copy of it.

name: Miser
text: Choose one: Put a Copper from your hand onto your Tavern mat; or +$1 per Copper on your Tavern mat.

name: Port
text: +1 Card. +2 Actions. When you buy this, gain another Port.

name: Ranger
text: +1 Buy. Turn your Journey token over (it starts face up). If it's face up, +5 Cards.

name: Transmogrify
text: +1 Action. Put this on your Tavern mat. At the start of your turn: You may call this to trash a card from your hand and gain a card costing up to $1 more than it into your hand.

name: Artificer
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. +$1. Discard any number of cards. You may gain a card costing exactly $1 per card discarded.

name: Bridge Troll
text: Each other player takes their -$1 token. Now and at the start of your next turn: +1 Buy. While this is in play, cards cost $1 less.

name: Distant Lands
text: Put this on your Tavern mat. Worth 4VP if it's there at the end of the game (otherwise 0VP).

name: Giant
text: Turn your Journey token over. If it's face up: +$1. If it's face down: +$5, and each other player reveals the top card of their deck, trashes it if it costs from $3 to $6, and otherwise discards it and gains a Curse.

name: Haunted Woods
text: Until your next turn, when any other player buys a card, they put their hand onto their deck. At the start of your next turn: +3 Cards.

name: Lost City
text: +2 Cards. +2 Actions. When you gain this, each other player draws a card.

name: Relic
text: +$2. When you play this, each other player puts their -1 Card token on their deck.

name: Royal Carriage
text: +1 Action. Put this on your Tavern mat. Directly after resolving an Action card, if it's still in play, you may call this to replay that Action card.

name: Storyteller
text: +1 Action. Play up to 3 Treasures from your hand. +1 Card per $1 they produce.

name: Swamp Hag
text: Until your next turn, when any other player buys a card, they gain a Curse. At the start of your next turn: +$3.

name: Treasure Trove
text: +$2. When you play this, gain a Gold and a Copper.

name: Wine Merchant
text: +1 Buy. +$4. Put this on your Tavern mat. At the end of your Buy phase, if you have $2 or less unspent, you may discard this from your Tavern mat.

name: Hireling
text: At the start of each of your turns for the rest of the game: +1 Card.

name: Alms
text: Once per turn: If you have no Treasures in play, gain a card costing up to $4.

name: Borrow
text: Once per turn: +1 Buy. If your deck is non-empty, flip your -1 Card token face down (if face up); if you did, +$1.

name: Quest
text: You may discard an Attack, 2 Curses, or 6 cards. If you do, gain a Gold.

name: Save
text: Once per turn: +1 Buy. Set aside a card from your hand, and put it into your hand at end of turn (after drawing).

name: Scouting Party
text: +1 Buy. Look at the top 5 cards of your deck. Discard 3 and put the rest back in any order.

name: Travelling Fair
text: +2 Buys. When you gain a card this turn, you may put it onto your deck.

name: Bonfire
text: Trash up to 2 Coppers you have in play.

name: Expedition
text: Draw 2 extra cards for your next hand.

name: Plan
text: Move your Trashing token to an Action card Supply pile. (When you buy a card from that pile, first trash a card from your hand.)

name: Lost Arts
text: Move your +1 Action token to an Action card Supply pile. (Cards from that pile give +1 Action when played.)

name: Training
text: Move your +$1 token to an Action card Supply pile. (Cards from that pile give +$1 when played.)

name: Inheritance
text: Once per game: Set aside a non-Command Action card from the Supply costing up to $4. Move your Estate token to it. (Estates are also Actions with the text of that card.)

name: Pathfinding
text: Move your +1 Card token to an Action card Supply pile. (Cards from that pile give +1 Card when played.)

name: Candlestick Maker
text: +1 Action. +1 Buy. +1 Coffers.

name: Stonemason
text: Trash a card from your hand. Gain 2 cards each costing less than it. When you buy this, you may overpay for it. If you do, gain 2 Action cards each costing the amount you overpaid.

name: Advisor
text: +1 Action. Reveal the top 3 cards of your deck. The player to your left chooses one for you to discard; put the rest into your hand.

name: Herald
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. Reveal the top card of your deck. If it's an Action, play it. When you buy this, you may overpay for it. For each $1 you overpaid, put a card from your discard pile onto your deck.

name: Plaza
text: +1 Card. +2 Actions. You may discard a Treasure. If you do, +1 Coffers.

name: Taxman
text: You may trash a Treasure from your hand. Each other player with 5 or more cards in hand discards a copy of it (or reveals they can't). Gain a Treasure costing up to $3 more than the trashed card.

name: Butcher
text: +2 Coffers. You may trash a card from your hand and then pay any number of Coffers. Gain a card costing up to the cost of the trashed card plus the Coffers paid.

name: Journeyman
text: Name a card. Reveal cards from your deck until you reveal 3 cards that are not the named card. Put those cards into your hand and discard the rest.

name: Merchant Guild
text: +1 Buy. +$1. While this is in play, when you buy a card, +1 Coffers.

name: Soothsayer
text: Gain a Gold. Each other player gains a Curse. Each player who gained a Curse draws a card.

name: Acting Troupe
text: +4 Villagers. Trash this.

name: Cargo Ship
text: +$2. Once this turn, when you gain a card, you may set it aside face up (on this). At the start of your next turn, put it into your hand.

name: Improve
text: +$2. At the end of your Action phase, you may trash an Action card you have in play, to gain a card costing exactly $1 more than it.

name: Lackeys
text: +2 Cards. When you discard this from play, +2 Villagers.

name: Old Witch
text: +3 Cards. Each other player gains a Curse and may trash a Curse from their hand.

name: Recruiter
text: +2 Cards. Trash a card from your hand. +1 Villager per $1 it costs.

name: Scepter
text: When you play this, choose one: +$2; or play an Action card from your hand that's in play again.

name: Scholar
text: Discard your hand. +7 Cards.

name: Sculptor
text: Gain a card to your hand costing up to $4. If it's a Treasure, +1 Villager.

name: Seer
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. Reveal the top 3 cards of your deck. Put the ones costing from $2 to $4 into your hand. Put the rest back in any order.

name: Silk Merchant
text: +2 Cards. +1 Buy. When you discard this from play, +1 Coffers, +1 Villagers.

name: Swashbuckler
text: +3 Cards. If your discard pile has any cards in it: +1 Coffers, then if you have at least 4 Coffers, gain a Treasure Chest.

name: Treasurer
text: +$3. Choose one: Trash a Treasure from your hand; or gain a Treasure from the trash to your hand; or take the Key.

name: Villain
text: +2 Coffers. Each other player with 5 or more cards in hand discards one costing $2 or more (or reveals they can't).

name: Flag Bearer
text: +$2. When you gain or trash this, take the Flag. (The player with the Flag draws an extra card at the start of their Buy phase.)

name: Border Guard
text: +1 Action. Reveal the top 2 cards of your deck. Put one into your hand and discard the other. If both are Actions, take the Lantern or Horn.

name: Ducat
text: +1 Coffers. +1 Buy. When you gain this, you may trash a Copper from your hand.

name: Hideout
text: +1 Card. +2 Actions. Trash a card from your hand. If it's a Victory card, gain a Curse.

name: Invention
text: Gain a card costing up to $4 from a Supply pile with no tokens on it (from Invention); put your Invention token on that pile. (Cards from that pile cost $1 less this turn.)

name: Mountain Village
text: +2 Actions. Look through your discard pile. You may put a card from it into your hand; otherwise, +1 Card.

name: Patron
text: +1 Villager. +$2. When another player plays a card that causes you to reveal this, +1 Coffers.

name: Priest
text: +$2. Trash a card from your hand. For the rest of this turn, when you trash a card, +$2.

name: Research
text: +1 Action. Trash a card from your hand. Per $1 it costs, set aside a card from your deck face down. At the start of your next turn, put them into your hand.

name: Cathedral
text: At the start of your turn, trash a card from your hand.

name: City Gate
text: At the start of your turn, +1 Card, then put a card from your hand onto your deck.

name: Pageant
text: At the end of your Buy phase, you may pay $1 for +1 Coffers.

name: Sewers
text: When you trash a card other than via Sewers, you may trash a card from your hand.

name: Star Chart
text: When you shuffle, you may put one of the shuffled cards on top.

name: Exploration
text: At the end of your Buy phase, if you didn't gain any cards, +1 Coffers and +1 Villagers.

name: Fair
text: At the start of your turn, +1 Buy.

name: Silos
text: At the start of your turn, discard any number of Coppers, revealed, and draw that many cards.

name: Sinister Plot
text: At the start of your turn, add a token here, or remove your tokens here for +1 Card each.

name: Academy
text: When you gain an Action card, +1 Villagers.

name: Capitalism
text: During your Buy phase, Action cards with +$ in their instructions can be played as Treasures.

name: Fleet
text: After the game ends, there is an extra final turn for each player who has bought this.

name: Guildhall
text: When you gain a Treasure, +1 Coffers.

name: Piazza
text: At the start of your turn, reveal the top card of your deck. If it's an Action, play it.

name: Road Network
text: When another player gains a Victory card, +1 Card.

name: Barracks
text: At the start of your turn, +1 Action.

name: Crop Rotation
text: At the start of your turn, you may discard a Victory card for +2 Cards.

name: Innovation
text: The first time you gain an Action card each turn, you may set it aside. If you do, play it.

name: Canal
text: Cards in Supply cost $1 less, but not less than $0.

name: Citadel
text: At the start of your turn, play the first Action card you have in play again.

name: Altar
text: Trash a card from your hand. Gain a card costing up to $5.

name: Armory
text: Gain a card onto your deck costing up to $4.

name: Band of Misfits
text: Play this as if it were a non-Command Action card in the Supply costing less than this.

name: Bandit Camp
text: +1 Action. Gain a Spoils. +$1.

name: Beggar
text: Discard your hand. Gain 3 Silvers, putting one on top of your deck. When another player plays an Attack card, you may discard this to gain 2 Silvers, putting one on top of your deck.

name: Catacombs
text: Look at the top 3 cards of your deck. Choose one: Put them into your hand; or discard them and +3 Cards. When you trash this, gain a cheaper card.

name: Count
text: Choose one: Discard 2 cards; or put a card from your hand onto your deck; or gain a Copper. Choose one: +$3; or trash your hand; or gain a Duchy.

name: Counterfeit
text: Worth $1. When you play this, you may play a Treasure from your hand twice. Trash that Treasure. +1 Buy.

name: Cultist
text: +2 Cards. Each other player gains a Ruins. You may play a Cultist from your hand.

name: Death Cart
text: You may trash this or an Action card from your hand, for +$5.

name: Feodum
text: Worth 1VP per 3 Silvers you have (rounded down). When you trash this, gain 3 Silvers.

name: Forager
text: +1 Action. +1 Buy. Trash a card from your hand. +$1 per differently named Treasure in the trash.

name: Fortress
text: +1 Card. +2 Actions. When you trash this, put it into your hand.

name: Graverobber
text: Choose one: Gain a card from the trash costing from $3 to $6, putting it on top of your deck; or trash an Action card from your hand and gain a card costing up to $3 more than it.

name: Hermit
text: Look through your discard pile. You may trash a non-Treasure card from your discard pile or hand. Gain a card costing up to $3. When you discard this from play, if you didn't buy any cards this turn, exchange this for a Madman.

name: Hunting Grounds
text: +4 Cards. When you trash this, gain a Duchy or 3 Estates.

name: Ironmonger
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. Reveal the top card of your deck; you may discard it. Either way, if it's an Action, +1 Action; if it's a Treasure, +$1; if it's a Victory card, +1 Card.

name: Junk Dealer
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. +$1. Trash a card from your hand.

name: Knights
text: A split pile of 10 different Knight cards. Each Knight: Each other player reveals the top 2 cards of their deck, trashes one costing from $3 to $6, and discards the rest. If a Knight is trashed by this, trash the attacking Knight too.

name: Marauder
text: Gain a Spoils. Each other player gains a Ruins.

name: Market Square
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. +1 Buy. When one of your cards is trashed, you may discard this from your hand to gain a Gold.

name: Mystic
text: +1 Action. +$2. Name a card, then reveal the top card of your deck. If it's the named card, put it into your hand.

name: Pillage
text: Trash this. Gain 2 Spoils. Each other player with 5 or more cards in hand reveals their hand and discards a card that you choose.

name: Poor House
text: +$4. Reveal your hand. -$1 per Treasure card in your hand.

name: Procession
text: You may play an Action card from your hand twice. Trash it. Gain an Action card costing exactly $1 more.

name: Rats
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. Gain a Rats. Trash a card from your hand other than a Rats (or reveal a hand of all Rats). When you trash this, +1 Card.

name: Rebuild
text: +1 Action. Name a card. Reveal cards from your deck until you reveal a Victory card that isn't the named card. Discard the rest. Trash it and gain a Victory card costing up to $3 more.

name: Rogue
text: +$2. If there are any cards in the trash costing from $3 to $6, gain one. Otherwise, each other player reveals the top 2 cards of their deck, trashes one costing from $3 to $6, and discards the rest.

name: Scavenger
text: +$2. You may put your deck into your discard pile. Look through your discard pile and put a card from it on top of your deck.

name: Squire
text: +$1. Choose one: +2 Actions; or +2 Buys; or gain a Silver. When you trash this, gain an Attack card.

name: Storeroom
text: +1 Buy. Discard any number of cards, +$1 per card discarded. Then discard any number of cards and draw that many.

name: Urchin
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. Each other player discards down to 4 cards in hand. When another Attack is in play when you play this, you may trash this to gain a Mercenary.

name: Vagrant
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. Reveal the top card of your deck. If it's a Curse, Ruins, Shelter, or Victory card, put it into your hand.

name: Wandering Minstrel
text: +1 Card. +2 Actions. Reveal the top 3 cards of your deck; put the Action cards back in any order and discard the rest.

name: Archive
text: +1 Action. Set aside 3 cards from the top of your deck face down (you may look at them). At the start of your next turn, put one into your hand; do so again on the turn after that.

name: Capital
text: Worth $6. +1 Buy. When you discard this from play, take 6 Debt, and may pay off Debt.

name: Castles
text: A split pile of 8 Castles, from Humble Castle ($3, 1VP) to King's Castle ($10, 2VP per Castle). Each Castle has a unique ability.

name: Catapult
text: +$1. Trash a card from your hand. If it costs $3 or more, each other player gains a Curse. If it's a Treasure, each other player discards down to 3 cards in hand.

name: Rocks
text: Worth $1. When you gain or trash this, gain a Silver; if it's your Buy phase, put the Silver on top of your deck.

name: Chariot Race
text: +1 Action. Reveal the top card of your deck and put it into your hand. Each player to your left reveals the top card of their deck. For each of those players whose revealed card costs more than yours, +$1 and +1VP.

name: Enchantress
text: Until your next turn, the first time each other player plays an Action card, they get +1 Card and +1 Action instead of following its instructions. At the start of your next turn, +2 Cards.

name: Engineer
text: Gain a card costing up to $4. You may trash this; if you do, gain a card costing up to $4.

name: Farmers' Market
text: +1 Buy. If there are 4VP or more on the Farmers' Market pile, remove them and trash this. Otherwise, add 1VP to the pile, then +$1 per VP on it.

name: Forum
text: +3 Cards. +1 Action. Discard 2 cards. When you buy this, +1 Buy.

name: Gladiator
text: +$2. Reveal a card from your hand. The player to your left may reveal a copy from their hand, to stop the attack. If they don't, trash a card from your hand and +$1.

name: Fortune
text: +1 Buy. When you play this, double your $ if you haven't yet this turn. Worth $. When you gain this, gain a Gold per Gladiator you have in play.

name: Grand Market
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. +1 Buy. +$2. You can't buy this if you have any Copper in play.

name: Groundskeeper
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. While this is in play, when you gain a Victory card, +1VP.

name: Legionary
text: +$3. You may reveal a Gold from your hand. If you do, each other player discards down to 2 cards in hand, then draws a card.

name: Overlord
text: Play this as if it were a non-Command Action card in the Supply costing up to $5.

name: Royal Blacksmith
text: +5 Cards. Reveal your hand; discard the Coppers.

name: Sacrifice
text: Trash a card from your hand. If it's an Action card, +2 Cards and +2 Actions. If it's a Treasure, +$2. If it's a Victory card, +2VP.

name: Settlers
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. Look through your discard pile. You may put a Copper from it into your hand.

name: Bustling Village
text: +1 Card. +3 Actions.

name: Temple
text: +1 Action. Trash from 1 to 3 differently named cards from your hand. +1VP per card in the Temple Supply pile.

name: Villa
text: +2 Actions. +1 Buy. +$1. When you gain this, put it into your hand, +1 Action, and if it's your Buy phase, return to your Action phase.

name: Wild Hunt
text: Choose one: +3 Cards and add 1VP to the Wild Hunt Supply pile; or gain an Estate and take the VP from the pile.

name: Advance
text: You may trash an Action card from your hand. If you do, gain an Action card costing up to $6.

name: Annex
text: Look through your discard pile. Shuffle all but up to 5 cards from it into your deck. Gain a Duchy.

name: Banquet
text: Gain 2 Coppers and a non-Victory card costing up to $5.

name: Delve
text: +1 Buy. Gain a Silver.

name: Donate
text: After this turn, put your deck and discard pile into your hand, trash any number of cards from it, then shuffle the rest into your deck.

name: Ritual
text: Gain a Curse. Trash a card from your hand. +1VP per $1 it costs.

name: Salt the Earth
text: +1VP. Trash a Victory card from the Supply.

name: Tax
text: Add 2 Debt to a Supply pile. When a player buys a card, they take that card's Debt.

name: Triumph
text: Gain an Estate. +1VP per card you've gained this turn.

name: Wedding
text: +1VP. Gain a Gold.

name: Windfall
text: If your deck and discard pile are both empty, gain 3 Golds.

name: Aqueduct
text: When you gain a Treasure, move 1VP from its pile to this. When you gain a Province, take the VP here.

name: Arena
text: At the start of your Buy phase, you may discard an Action card. If you do, take 2VP from here.

name: Bandit Fort
text: When scoring, -2VP for each Silver and each Gold you have.

name: Basilica
text: When you buy a card, if you have $2 or more left, take 2VP from here.

name: Baths
text: When you end your turn without having gained a card, take 2VP from here.

name: Battlefield
text: When you gain a Victory card, take 2VP from here.

name: Colonnade
text: When you buy an Action card, if you have a copy of it in play, take 2VP from here.

name: Defiled Shrine
text: When you gain a non-Gathering Action, move 1VP from its pile to this. When you buy a Curse, take the VP here.

name: Fountain
text: When scoring, 15VP if you have at least 10 Coppers.

name: Keep
text: When scoring, 5VP per Treasure type you have more of than each other player.

name: Labyrinth
text: When you gain a 2nd card in any of your turns, take 2VP from here.

name: Mountain Pass
text: When you are the first player to gain a Province, each player bids once, up to 40 Debt. High bidder takes 8VP and takes their Debt.

name: Museum
text: When scoring, 2VP per differently named card you have.

name: Obelisk
text: Choose an Action Supply pile during setup. When scoring, 2VP per card you have from that pile.

name: Orchard
text: When scoring, 4VP per differently named Action card you have 3 or more copies of.

name: Palace
text: When scoring, 3VP per set of Copper, Silver, and Gold you have.

name: Tomb
text: When you trash a card, +1VP.

name: Tower
text: When scoring, 1VP per non-Victory card you have from an empty Supply pile.

name: Triumphal Arch
text: When scoring, 3VP per copy of the 2nd most common Action card among your cards (if tied for 2nd, count it as 0 copies).

name: Wall
text: When scoring, -1VP per card you have past 15.

name: Wolf Den
text: When scoring, -3VP per card type you have exactly 1 copy of.

name: Animal Fair
text: +1 Buy. +$4. When buying this, you may trash an Action card from your hand; if you do, pay $0 instead of Animal Fair's cost.

name: Barge
text: Either now or at the start of your next turn (your choice), +3 Cards and +1 Buy.

name: Black Cat
text: +2 Cards. If it isn't your turn, each other player gains a Curse. When another player gains a Victory card, you may play this from your hand.

name: Bounty Hunter
text: +1 Action. Exile a card from your hand. If you didn't have a copy of it in Exile, +$3.

name: Camel Train
text: Exile a non-Victory card from the Supply. When you gain this, exile a Gold from the Supply.

name: Cardinal
text: +$2. Each other player reveals the top 2 cards of their deck, exiles one costing from $3 to $6, and discards the rest.

name: Cavalry
text: Gain 2 Horses. When you gain this, +2 Cards, +1 Buy, and if it's your Buy phase return to your Action phase.

name: Coven
text: +1 Action. +$2. Each other player exiles a Curse from the Curse pile, or discards their Curses from Exile, gaining them.

name: Destrier
text: +2 Cards. +1 Action. During your turns, this costs $1 less per card you've gained this turn.

name: Displace
text: Exile a card from your hand. Gain a differently named card costing up to $2 more than the exiled card.

name: Falconer
text: Gain a card to your hand costing less than this. When any player gains a multi-type card, you may play this from your hand.

name: Fisherman
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. +$1. During your turns, if your discard pile is empty, this costs $2 instead.

name: Gatekeeper
text: At the start of your next turn, +$3. Until then, when another player gains a Treasure or Action card, if no copy of it is in Exile, they exile a copy of it from the Supply.

name: Goatherd
text: +1 Action. You may trash a card from your hand. +1 Card per card the player to your right trashed on their last turn.

name: Groom
text: Gain a card costing up to $4. If it's an Action card, +1 Card and +1 Action. If it's a Treasure, gain a Silver. If it's a Victory card, +1 Card.

name: Hostelry
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. You may discard any number of Treasures, revealed, for +1 Horse each.

name: Hunting Lodge
text: +1 Card. +2 Actions. You may discard your hand for +5 Cards.

name: Kiln
text: +$2. The next time you play a card this turn, you may gain a copy of it.

name: Livery
text: +$3. This turn, when you gain a card costing $4 or more, gain a Horse.

name: Mastermind
text: At the start of your next turn, you may play an Action card from your hand three times.

name: Paddock
text: +$2. +2 Actions. Gain 2 Horses. +1 Action per empty Supply pile.

name: Sanctuary
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. You may trash a card from your hand. You may exile a card from your hand.

name: Scrap
text: Trash a card from your hand. Choose a different option per $1 it costs: +1 Card; +1 Action; +1 Buy; +$1; gain a Silver; gain a Horse.

name: Sleigh
text: Gain 2 Horses. When you gain a card, you may discard this to put that card into your hand or onto your deck.

name: Snowy Village
text: +1 Card. +4 Actions. +1 Buy. Any unused Actions this turn are lost.

name: Stockpile
text: Worth $3. +1 Buy. When you play this, exile it.

name: Supplies
text: Worth $1. When you play this, gain a Horse onto your deck.

name: Village Green
text: Either now or at the start of your next turn (your choice), +1 Card and +1 Action. When you discard this other than during Clean-up, you may play it.

name: Wayfarer
text: +3 Cards. You may gain a Silver. This costs the same as the last other card gained this turn, if any.

name: Way of the Butterfly
text: You may return the card you played this as to the Supply for a card costing exactly $1 more than it.

name: Way of the Camel
text: Exile a Copper from your hand or the Supply.

name: Way of the Chameleon
text: Follow the instructions of the card you're playing as this; but each time you would get +Cards this turn, instead get +$, and vice versa.

name: Way of the Frog
text: +1 Action. At the end of this turn, put a card from your hand onto your deck.

name: Way of the Goat
text: Trash a card from your hand.

name: Way of the Horse
text: +2 Cards. +1 Action. Return the card you played this as to the Supply.

name: Way of the Mole
text: +1 Action. Discard your hand. +3 Cards.

name: Way of the Monkey
text: Until your next turn, when another player gains a card, +$1.

name: Way of the Mouse
text: Play the set-aside card, leaving it there. (Set aside a non-Way Action costing up to $4 not in the Supply during setup.)

name: Way of the Mule
text: +1 Action. +$1.

name: Way of the Otter
text: +2 Cards.

name: Way of the Owl
text: Draw until you have 6 cards in hand.

name: Way of the Ox
text: +2 Actions.

name: Way of the Pig
text: +1 Card. +1 Action.

name: Way of the Rat
text: Discard a card to gain a copy of the card you played this as.

name: Way of the Seal
text: +$1. This turn, when you gain a card, put it onto your deck.

name: Way of the Squirrel
text: +2 Cards at the end of this turn.

name: Way of the Turtle
text: Set aside the card you played this as. At the start of your next turn, play it.

name: Way of the Worm
text: Exile an Estate from the Supply.

name: Delay
text: You may set aside a card from your hand. At the start of your next turn, play it.

name: Demand
text: Gain a Horse and a card costing up to $4, both onto your deck.

name: Desperation
text: Once per turn: You may gain a Curse. If you do, +1 Buy and +$2.

name: Gamble
text: +1 Buy. Reveal the top card of your deck. If it's a Treasure, you may play it.

name: Pursue
text: +1 Buy. Name a card. Reveal the top 4 cards of your deck. Put the matches on top and discard the rest.

name: Ride
text: Gain a Horse.

name: Seize the Day
text: Once per game: Take an extra turn after this one.

name: Commerce
text: Gain a Gold per differently named Treasure you played this turn.

name: Populate
text: Gain one card from each Action Supply pile.

name: Transport
text: Choose one: Exile an Action card from the Supply; or put an Action card you have in Exile into your hand.

name: Enclave
text: Gain a Gold. Exile a Duchy from the Supply.

name: Alliance
text: Gain a Province, a Duchy, an Estate, a Gold, a Silver, and a Copper.

name: Bard
text: +$2. Receive a Boon.

name: Blessed Village
text: +1 Card. +2 Actions. At the start of your next turn, receive a Boon.

name: Cemetery
text: Trash up to 4 cards from your hand. (Heirloom: Haunted Mirror)

name: Changeling
text: Exchange this for a copy of a card you have in play.

name: Cobbler
text: At the start of your next turn, gain a card costing up to $4 to your hand.

name: Conclave
text: +$2. You may play an Action card from your hand that you don't have a copy of in play. If you do, +1 Action.

name: Crypt
text: Set aside any number of Treasures you have in play face down. At the start of each of your turns, put one into your hand; when they are all gone, discard this.

name: Den of Sin
text: At the start of your next turn, +2 Cards.

name: Devil's Workshop
text: Gain a card based on how many cards you've gained this turn: 2+, gain an Imp; 1, gain a Gold; 0, gain a card costing up to $4.

name: Druid
text: +1 Action. Receive one of the set-aside Boons (3 Boons are chosen at game start for Druid).

name: Exorcist
text: Trash a card from your hand. Gain a cheaper Spirit from its pile.

name: Faithful Hound
text: +2 Cards. When you discard this other than during Clean-up, you may set it aside, returning it to your hand at end of turn.

name: Ghost Town
text: At the start of your next turn, +1 Card and +1 Action.

name: Guardian
text: At the start of your next turn, +$1. Until then, when another player plays an Attack, it doesn't affect you.

name: Idol
text: Worth $2. When you play this, if you have an odd number of Idols in play, receive a Boon; if even, each other player gains a Curse.

name: Leprechaun
text: +$1. If you have exactly 7 cards in play, gain a Gold. Each other player receives a Hex.

name: Monastery
text: For each card you've gained this turn, you may trash a card from your hand or a Copper you have in play.

name: Necromancer
text: Play a face-up Action card from the trash, leaving it there and turning it face down.

name: Night Watchman
text: Look at the top 5 cards of your deck, discard any number, and put the rest back in any order. When you buy this, you may play it immediately.

name: Pixie
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. Receive a Boon. You may trash this to receive the Boon twice. (Heirloom: Goat)

name: Pooka
text: You may trash a Treasure other than Cursed Gold from your hand, for +4 Cards. (Heirloom: Cursed Gold)

name: Raider
text: Each other player with 5 or more cards in hand discards a copy of a card you have in play (or reveals they can't). At the start of your next turn, +$3.

name: Sacred Grove
text: +1 Buy. +$3. Receive a Boon. If it doesn't give +$, each other player may receive it too.

name: Secret Cave
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. You may discard 3 cards. If you do, +$3 at the start of your next turn. (Heirloom: Magic Lamp)

name: Shepherd
text: +1 Action. Discard any number of Victory cards, revealed. +2 Cards per card discarded. (Heirloom: Pasture)

name: Skulk
text: +1 Buy. Each other player receives a Hex. When you gain this, gain a Gold.

name: Swamp Hag
text: Until your next turn, when another player buys a card, they gain a Curse. At the start of your next turn, +$3.

name: Tracker
text: +$1. Receive a Boon. While this is in play, when you gain a card, you may put it onto your deck. (Heirloom: Pouch)

name: Tragic Hero
text: +3 Cards. +1 Buy. If you have 8 or more cards in hand (after drawing), trash this and gain a Treasure.

name: Vampire
text: Each other player receives a Hex. Gain a card costing up to $5 other than a Vampire. Exchange this for a Bat.

name: Werewolf
text: If it's your Night phase, each other player receives a Hex. Otherwise, +3 Cards.

name: Bauble
text: Worth $1. +1 Buy. When you buy a card, you may gain a Favor.

name: Broker
text: Trash a card from your hand. Choose one per $1 it costs: +1 Card; +$1; +1 Action; or gain a Favor.

name: Carpenter
text: If no Supply piles are empty, +2 Actions and set aside a card from your hand (return it to your hand at the start of your next turn). Otherwise, gain a card costing up to $4.

name: Clinician
text: +3 Actions. When you discard this from play, you may trash an Action card from your hand.

name: Collective
text: +1 Card. Gain a Favor per differently named Action card you have in play.

name: Contract
text: Worth $2. You may play an Action card from your hand at the start of your next turn.

name: Courier
text: +$1. Discard the top card of your deck. You may gain a card costing up to $2 or a card of the same cost as the discarded card.

name: Emissary
text: Shuffle your discard pile into your deck. If you did, +3 Cards and gain a Favor.

name: Footpad
text: Each other player gains a Copper. Night: +2 Cards.

name: Galleria
text: +$3. Spend any number of Favors: +1 Buy each.

name: Grotto
text: +1 Action. Set aside up to 4 cards from your hand face down. At the start of your next turn, put them into your hand and +1 Card.

name: Highwayman
text: +1 Card. Until your next turn, the first Treasure each other player plays on their turn has no effect. At the start of your next turn, +1 Card.

name: Hill Fort
text: Gain a card costing up to $4. Either put it into your hand, or +1 Card and +1 Action.

name: Hunter
text: Reveal the top 3 cards of your deck. Put one of each type (Action, Treasure, Victory) into your hand. Discard the rest.

name: Importer
text: Gain a Favor. At the start of your next turn, gain a card costing up to $5.

name: Innkeeper
text: +1 Action. Choose one: +1 Card; or discard any number of cards, then spend that many Favors to draw that many cards.

name: Lackeys
text: +2 Cards. When you gain this, +2 Villagers.

name: League of Bankers
text: +$1 per 4 Favors you have (rounded down).

name: League of Shopkeepers
text: +$1 per Favor you have. If you have 5 or more Favors, also +1 Card and +1 Action.

name: Merchant Camp
text: +2 Actions. +$1. When you discard this from play, you may put it onto your deck (once per turn).

name: Ormolu
text: Worth $3. When you play this, gain a Favor.

name: Royal Galley
text: +1 Card. You may play an Action card from your hand twice. Set it aside; at the start of your next turn, put it into your hand.

name: Swap
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. You may return an Action card from your hand to the Supply. If you do, gain a differently named Action card costing up to $1 more than it.

name: Sycophant
text: +1 Action. Discard 3 cards: gain 3 Favors. When you trash this, gain a Favor.

name: Tent
text: +$2. When you discard this from play, you may put it onto your deck (once per turn).

name: Town
text: +1 Card. +2 Actions. Choose one: +1 Buy; or +$2.

name: Underling
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. Gain a Favor.

name: Warlord
text: +2 Cards. Until your next turn, other players can't play an Action card they've already played 2 or more copies of this turn.

name: Barbarian
text: +$2. Each other player trashes the top card of their deck. If it costs $3 or more, they gain a cheaper card sharing a type with it.

name: Architects' Guild
text: When you gain a card, you may spend a Favor to gain a cheaper non-Victory card.

name: Circle of Witches
text: Spend 3 Favors: each other player gains a Curse.

name: City-state
text: Spend 2 Favors: play an Action card from your hand.

name: Coastal Haven
text: At the end of your turn, spend any number of Favors: keep that many extra cards in hand.

name: Crafters' Guild
text: Spend 2 Favors: gain a card costing up to $4 to your hand.

name: Desert Guides
text: At the start of your turn, spend any number of Favors: discard that many cards and draw that many.

name: Family of Inventors
text: Spend 1 Favor: a non-Victory Supply pile of your choice costs $1 less this turn (but not less than $0).

name: Fellowship of Scribes
text: When you play an Action card and have fewer than 4 cards in hand, you may spend 1 Favor for +1 Card.

name: Gang of Pickpockets
text: At the start of your turn, discard a card or spend a Favor.

name: Island Folk
text: After your turn, you may spend 5 Favors to take an extra turn after this one.

name: Market Towns
text: Spend 1 Favor: play an Action card from your hand.

name: Order of Astrologers
text: When shuffling, you may spend any number of Favors to put that many cards from your shuffled deck on top.

name: Order of Masons
text: When shuffling, set aside up to 2 cards per Favor spent, then discard them.

name: Peaceful Cult
text: Spend any number of Favors: trash that many cards from your hand.

name: Plateau Shepherds
text: When scoring: 2VP per pair of Favors and cards costing $2 that you have.

name: Relative of the Watch
text: At the start of your turn, you may put your hand onto your deck and draw 5 cards.

name: Sorcerers' Guild
text: At the start of your Buy phase, spend any number of Favors. Each other player's cards cost $1 more per Favor this turn.

name: Trappers' Lodge
text: When you gain a card, you may spend a Favor to put it onto your deck.

name: Woodworkers' Guild
text: Spend 3 Favors: gain an Action card costing up to $6.
